The "U" in UAP means unidentified. "The pilot reported seeing Iranian drones" -- seems pretty clearly identified to me. So, "we don't know" is absolutely a lie. We do know, the pilot said what it is.
@GoGoDokukinoko good morning ☺️🌹 Do you believe on UFO ?
@Truthpole @mbattista25 I tried to summons a UAP first time ever cause I've heard that a thing and all I got was 2 big black birds that came and circled around the point I was focusing on.

I realize that much information I have presented is somewhat terrifying to realize if one has not considered any of these things before, but this is the UAP community, which is why I'm putting it here
I found the NUFORC report in this reddit thread regarding a UFO sighting last week on an oil rig in the Gulf of America: https://t.co/oEXH2VzPJL
